items.name_en: Chane1🔯24k Camera Bag AS5190 Double C Coin Pendant Soft Lamb Leather with Retro Metal Unique body, simple yet not simplistic
items.name_cn:
Chane1🔯24k Camera Bag AS5190 Double C Coin Pendant Soft Lamb Leather with Retro Metal Unique body, simple yet not simplistic
The petite and lightweight camera bag design, paired with gold accents, adds a touch of playfulness and makes the overall look more romantic and elegant~
Paired with a classic woven chain, it is not only practical and exquisite but also enhances feminine elegance Dimensions: 12×18×7cm

items.name_cn:
Suede [Small Dark Brown] Available
MIUMI^24FW Autumn/Winter Suede Series Bowling Bag
The hottest element this autumn and winter should be suede! Softy padded is a reinterpretation of the classic bowling bag shape. The simple design highlights the bag's diverse functionality and practical concept. The brand new suede material maximizes the autumn/winter atmosphere, exuding a super high-end retro tone. Which one is your pick from the MIUMI^ Autumn/Winter series?

items.name_en: New version Cognac: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, a mainstay on the official website, this is absolutely a hit🔥 style this year. Top-tier imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front embossed logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, many celebrities and influencers are wearing it. Dimensions 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging

items.name_en: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag. The velvet element that is popular this autumn and winter. Top layer of velvet calf leather. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, brand new canvas lining, with a zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Dimensions 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging.
